title: Sniffer Revamp
description: Adds New Diggable Items to Sniffers, and Uses for Pitcher Pods and Torchflowers!
body:
# -!IMPORTANT!-
This mod will no longer be updated, as I made it a while ago and I do not want to continue work on it. The mod is no longer up to my standards, so it will be archived.
# Sniffer Revamp
## New Woodset
Sniffer Revamp adds the Cycad Sapling, which you can grow into a Cycad. This adds an all new type of wood you can build with called Cycad Wood.
## Velvet Amber
Based off of the Resin block set, Velvet Amber is a new Brick block set!
## Torchflower
If you right click on the Torchflower, it now causes all hostile mobs in a circle around it to catch on fire
## Pitcher Poison
If an entity collides with a Pitcher Plant, they will get a new effect: Pitcher Poison! It lowers the entity's max health and armor, and completely slow you down to a point you can't move. You can also brew it into a Potion of Pitcher Poison.
## Blue Rose
From old versions of Minecraft Pocket Edition, the Blue Rose can now be obtained from the Sniffer
